StructurePhase.Reference: Sebastian C.P., Fehse C., Eckert H., Hoffman R.D., Pottgen R., Solid State Sci., v8 p1386-1392 (2006)
StructurePhase.Comment: Color: metallic luster. Habit: irregular. LPF Collection Code: 1910561. Sample Preparation: STARTINGMATERIALS: Y (ingot), Cu (wire), Sn (shot). COMPOUND PREPARATION: arc-melted, remelted three times. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Article Title: Structure, 119Sn solid state NMR and Mossbauer spectroscopy of RECuSn (RE= Sc, Y, La, Lu). Wyckoff Sequence: b2 a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Thirion F., Steinmetz J., Malaman B., Mater. Res. Bull., v18 p1537 (1983)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N3O4P4. LPF Collection Code: 537800. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Y,Cu,Sn. Compound Preparation: heated at 673 K and 1073 K for several days in evacuated quartz tube, quenched. Article Title: STRUCTURES CRISTALLINES DE Sc3Cu4Ge4, T.R.3Cu4Sn4 (T.R.= Y, Gd, Tb, Dy, Ho, Er), ISOTYPES DE Gd3Cu4Ge4, ET DE LA PHASE APPARENTEE Tm3Cu4Sn4. Wyckoff Sequence: l j i h a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
